Create quick notes or clip web page content, and save them to Monolog.
Monolog is a cross-platform note-taking app. This extension enables you to create quick notes or clip web page content, and save them to Monolog.

Earn credits and points by completing missions, and get rewards on your vendor's Loyalty Club.

🟣 Philia™ is a Cloud-based Loyalty Program that allows you to be more connected to the Vendors you love. By providing a rich experience of exciting rewards, a profitable missions.

🟣 Here is how to get started:
1️⃣ Click on "Add to Chrome" button to install the Philia Loyalty extension.
2️⃣ Log in to your vendor's Loyalty Club via your browser.
3️⃣ After logging in, open the extension to see the Available Missions, available exclusively on the Extension.
4️⃣ Follow the missions instructions, and get rewarded as you complete them.
5️⃣ Your rewards will be automatically added to your account.
✨ Enjoy!

OpenAir Enhancement Suite is an extension that improves usability in OpenAir. The primary function is colorizing time-sheets according to the project name.

OpenAir Enhancement Suite is not associated with OpenAir in any way.


==========
Changelog:
==========
v1.6.0 - Updated to manifest v3. Adjusted to an OpenAir update where the hostname was an unexpected value

v1.5.1 - Adjusted to an OpenAir update where the hostname was an unexpected value

v1.5.0 - Fixed an issue where colour preferences were not being remembered

v1.4.1 - Fixed an issue where the first row would hide slightly under the header

v1.4.0 - Option for "Tight Mode" and fixed column alignment issues

v1.3.0 - Shows totals for each project

v1.2.0 - Colour palette is now custom

v1.1.0 - Can make unused rows uncolored. May toggle this on/off

v1.0.0 - Release

The “AuthX Vault” extension is a password manager that offers secure and convenient features for managing your passwords and logging into both enterprise and personal applications. Here are some key features of the AuthX Vault extension:

•	Auto login to your Enterprise and personal apps with just one click!
•	Manage your own applications.
•	Access your AuthX user dashboard applications.
•	AuthX Vault is built with No-Knowledge security architecture where are the data in cloud is fully encrypted and only accessible by you.
•	AuthX Vault provides additional layer of security with Multi Factor Authentication for your sensitive data with various options of biometrics, mobile and one-time passcodes. 
•	Protection with AES 256-Bit encryption.
•	Store unlimited password records in your secure, encrypted vault
Sign up for a free account on AuthX to configure your plugin. 
Need Help reach out to us on help@authx.com
A browser extension for PointsNav built with WXT and Svelte

Track All Your Travel Rewards in One Place! 🌟

Points Navigator automatically tracks your points and miles across dozens of airline, hotel, and credit-card loyalty programs — all in a single, easy-to-use dashboard.

✨ Key Features
• Automatic point-balance updates
• Real-time tracking across multiple reward programs
• Secure and private — no sensitive data collected
• Works with both domestic and international loyalty programs
• Clean and intuitive interface

Whether you’re a frequent traveler or simply managing a few reward accounts, Points Navigator helps you stay organized and never miss a point.

Supported Program Types
• Airlines (e.g., major U.S. and international carriers)
• Hotels (global hospitality groups and partner chains)
• Credit-card rewards (leading bank reward ecosystems)

Download Points Navigator and take control of your travel rewards! ✈️🏨💳
Your Digital Fortress for Public Browsing

In today's connected world, your digital safety shouldn't be compromised just because you're using a shared computer. SecureSession is your personal digital fortress, transforming any public PC into a secure, private browsing environment with just one click. Whether you're at a library, internet cafe, hotel business center, or any shared space, SecureSession ensures your online activities remain confidential and protected.
Key Features:
🛡️ Instant Armor: Activate a fully secure browsing environment in seconds.
🕵️ Trace Eraser: Automatically wipes all your data when you're done.
⏱️ Time Guardian: Set session durations to match your needs.
🔒 File Fortress: View and manage documents without leaving traces on public PCs.
🌐 SafeNet: Browse with enhanced security protocols.
Whether you're a student researching at the library, a professional checking emails at a business center, or simply someone who values privacy while using shared computers, SecureSession provides peace of mind with every click.
Download SecureSession today and turn any public computer into your personal, secure workspace!

Perfect for:
⦿ Students using campus computers
⦿ Professionals on-the-go
⦿ Library patrons
⦿ Internet cafe visitors
⦿ Anyone using shared or public computers

SecureSession: Your bubble of security in a public digital world.
Disclaimer:
Important: SecureSession is designed to enhance your privacy and security while using public computers, but it is not a complete anonymity solution. While we clear your browsing data from the local machine, your internet service provider, websites you visit, and potential network observers may still be able to track your online activities.

SecureSession does not make you anonymous online, nor does it encrypt your internet connection. For full anonymity and encryption, consider using a VPN in addition to SecureSession.
We strive to provide the highest level of security, but we cannot guarantee complete protection against all potential threats. Users are responsible for their online activities and should always exercise caution when accessing sensitive information on public networks.
CodingKaro is an all-in-one extension for coding enthusiasts.

Introducing CodingKaro – Your Ultimate Coding Contest Companion!

Explore coding contests effortlessly across more than 10 premier platforms like CodeChef, CodeForces, LeetCode, Kaggle, Toph, AtCoder, Geeks for Geeks, CodeTStudio, and more. CodingKaro is not just an extension; it's your personal coding concierge, ensuring you never miss out on any coding contest action.

Key Features:

Multi-Platform Contest Tracking: Stay ahead by seamlessly monitoring coding contests from over 10 renowned sites, all from one centralized hub – CodingKaro.

Smart Reminders on Multiple Devices: Set reminders effortlessly on Google Calendar and receive notifications on your PC, ensuring you're always prepared for the next coding challenge.

Mobile App Integration: Extend the power of CodingKaro to your mobile device with the companion app. Carry your coding contests wherever you go for uninterrupted coding excellence.

Upcoming Features for Career Growth: Stay tuned for upcoming features like job and internship updates, automatic reminders, and much more – making CodingKaro your holistic coding companion.

What's New?

One-Click Contest Access: Dive into coding contests with a single click, streamlining your contest participation process for a seamless experience.

Google Calendar Integration: Add contests to your schedule effortlessly, utilizing Google Calendar's robust features to manage your coding journey efficiently.

Smart Alarms for Precision: Set alarms to open contest links one minute before the start, ensuring you're at the forefront of every competition.

Tailored Updates: Choose specific websites for updates, customizing your experience to receive notifications only from your preferred coding platforms.

Key Features of CodingKaro:

Effortless Contest Access: Click on the contest name and instantly immerse yourself in the coding challenge.

Timely Contest Reminders: Receive reminders five minutes before each contest with a simple click on the bell icon, ensuring you're always prepared.

Seamless Schedule Management: Add contests to your schedule effortlessly, keeping your coding journey organized and stress-free.

Tailored Platform Updates: Customize your experience by receiving updates only for contests on your chosen coding platforms.

Access to Top Programming Platforms: Explore contests from all popular programming platforms, expanding your coding horizons.

Intuitive Contest Filtering: Filter contests by timeframe, including live contests, those within 24 hours, upcoming challenges, and ongoing live events.

Sites Supported:

CodingKaro supports almost all top coding contest websites, providing you with a comprehensive coding contest management solution.

Don't let coding opportunities slip away! Embrace the future of coding contest management with CodingKaro. Join our community of coding enthusiasts who are already harnessing the power of this game-changing Chrome extension. Get ready to code, conquer, and celebrate victory – all with your trusty buddy, CodingKaro!

Collaborate on any webpage with discussions next to content, and context-enriched AI assistance for search, recall, and summaries.

Imagine keeping track of every website visit by why you went there and what you discussed—right on the page. This extension helps your team leave comments, store helpful links, and record important points so you can always pick up where you left off. By combining your workspace data (like conversations, bookmarks, and notes) with what you do in the browser, it builds a breadcrumb trail that’s easy to recall and expand upon.

🚀 Smart Collaboration 🚀

Leverage AI to help you find information faster, not replace your workflow:

1️⃣ Context-Aware Summaries

•	Get quick, concise overviews of your ongoing discussions—no need to reread long threads.

2️⃣ Knowledge Base for AI

•	Ask questions right on the page, and let the AI draw from both your workspace data (comments, bookmarks, links) and browsing data to give you answers in context.

3️⃣ Quick Navigation

•	Jump straight to relavant comments, files, or links without hunting through emails or chat logs.


💡 Why Teams Love It 💡

✅ Real-Time Feedback – Collaborate and refine ideas while you’re on the page.
✅ Clear Organization – Keep notes, bookmarks, and discussions where they belong.
✅ Easy Recall – Use the AI to quickly surface past details whenever you need them.


Take your online collaboration to the next level. Whether you’re planning a trip with friends or building your next big project, this extension helps everyone stay on the same page—literally. Comment on product specs, marketing ideas, or design mockups right where they live. Stop losing track of important details and enjoy a more streamlined, context-rich way of working together online.
A browser extension for the popular sg.hu site

Az sg.hu nemhivatalos Chrome bővítménye.	
		
A bővítmény funkciói:
	- Chat elrejtése
	- 'Ugrás az utolsó olvasatlan üzenethez' több oldalon keresztül
	- Csak olvasatlan üzenettel rendelkező kedvencek mutatása [Ötlet: Malakai]
	- Rövid kommentjelzők
	- Egyéni tiltólista [Ötlet: cSuwwi]
	- Egyedi megjelenés pár helyen
	- Az oldal aljára érve automatikusan előtölti a következő oldal kommentjeit
	- Navigációs gombok a topikokban
	- Animált válaszerre üzenet lenyitás
	- Overlay commentbox
	- Nekem érkező üzenetek kiemelése
	- Üzenetek szálankénti elrendezése
	- Említett kommentek beidézése
	- Oldalsáv blokkok átrendezése, rejtése
	- Kedvencek automatikus frissítése
	- Összes topik olvasottnak jelölése
	- Reklámok eltávolítása
	- Smilek típusuk szerinti csoportosítása
	- Topik fehérlista
	- Topikba érkező üzenetek automatikus kinyerése
	- Felhasználói profilcsoportok
	- Topikon belül lekérhető a felhasználó adatlapja
	- Gyors beszúrás: Vágólapról bemásolt linkeket/képeket autómatikusan BBCODE-ok közé illeszti
	- A már megnyitott kategória oldalakat, topikokat jelzi főoldalon, kategória és topik nézetben

Page2Voice - AI Text to Speech that Runs Locally
Page2Voice reads your pages with realistic voices.  Everything runs on your local computer. Best with computers that has GPUs.

🔥 Key Features of Page2Voice 🔥

✅ Select some texts on your page and click on the read icon to read.
✅ Everything runs on your local computer, no texts is sent to the server.
✅ Over 25 natural voices for selection.
✅ Different speed settings, pause/play, etc.
✅ One time permanent license wtih full experience free trial.
✅ Best with computers that has GPUs.
✅ Supported language: English.

By https://page2voice.com
GitLab MR Actions - Auto-merge, Version Bump, Jira & CI Tools
One-click actions for GitLab MRs: auto-merge, version bump, force merge, custom CI jobs. No tokens needed. Integration with Jira.

Features:
- Auto-merge — Rebase branch and enable "merge when pipeline succeeds" in one click
- Force merge — Skip pipeline and merge immediately when CI isn't needed
- Ship (Version + Merge) — Full release flow: bump version → wait for pipeline → auto-merge
- Version bump — Increment version in package.json, pyproject.toml, or any file (patch/minor/major strategy)
- New pipeline / Cancel pipeline — Create or cancel pipelines instantly
- Draft / Ready toggle — Switch MR status without editing the title
- Retry failed jobs — Retry all failed jobs in the latest pipeline at once
- Reviewers — Repost reviewer assignment comment or mention configured teammates
- Custom job buttons — Trigger any CI job with one click; chain multiple jobs (e.g. build → deploy)
- Per-project profiles — Different version files, jobs, and button sets for each repository
- MR age badge — See how long a merge request has been open
- Background execution — Long-running chains survive page navigation
- Drag & drop button order — Arrange buttons the way you prefer
- Sound & desktop notifications — Get notified when actions complete or fail
- Dark theme — Follows system preference automatically
- i18n — English and Russian, auto-detected or manually set
- Issue type & priority icons in sidebar — type and priority fields display native Jira icons from the server alongside the field name.
- Show issue type & priority on MR list — optional setting to display Jira issue type and priority icons next to status badges on the MR list and detail pages.
- Sprint field in sidebar — shows the current sprint name in the Jira ticket sidebar. Automatically detects the Sprint custom field ID.
- Clickable Epic Link — Epic Link in the sidebar is a clickable link that opens the epic in Jira in a new tab. 
- Status change confirmation — changing Jira status now requires confirmation. Skipped when "Skip confirmation dialogs" is enabled.
- MR list enhancements:
    - Dim Draft MRs — Visually dim drafts so you can focus on active merge requests
    - Highlight your MRs — Blue border on your own MRs for quick identification          
    - "Only mine" toggle — Filter the list to show only your merge requests  
    - "Needs my review" toggle — Filter to show MRs where you are assigned as reviewer   
    - "Your review" badge — Scans MR comments for "Reviewer(s): @you" and shows a badge  
    - Copy MR from list — Copy button in the controls bar of each MR item    
    - Jira status badges — Shows Jira ticket statuses (Done, In Progress, QA, In Review, To Do) parsed from MR titles. Color-coded, cached, with loading skeletons

Advantages: 
- No personal access tokens — uses your existing GitLab session 
- Works with any self-hosted GitLab instance and gitlab.com 
- Replaces multi-step manual workflows with a single click
- Fully configurable per project — no one-size-fits-all limitations 
- Lightweight — no external services, all actions via GitLab API directly
- Jira integration without API tokens — uses your browser session cookies

---

Функции:
- Auto-merge — Rebase ветки и включение "merge when pipeline succeeds" в один клик
- Force merge — Пропустить пайплайн и смержить немедленно 
- Ship (Version + Merge) — Полный релизный флоу: поднять версию → дождаться пайплайна → auto-merge
- Version bump — Поднятие версии в package.json, pyproject.toml или любом файле (patch/minor/major)
- Новый пайплайн / Отмена пайплайна — Создание или отмена пайплайнов мгновенно
- Draft / Ready — Переключение статуса MR без редактирования заголовка
- Повтор упавших jobs — Перезапуск всех failed jobs последнего пайплайна разом
- Ревьюеры — Повтор комментария с назначением ревьюеров или mention списка из настроек
- Кастомные job-кнопки — Запуск любого CI job одним кликом; цепочки (напр. build → deploy)
- Профили проектов — Разные файлы версий, jobs и набор кнопок для каждого репозитория
- Возраст MR — Бейдж показывает сколько времени MR открыт
- Фоновое выполнение — Цепочки действий переживают навигацию между страницами
- Drag & drop порядок кнопок — Расположите кнопки как удобно
- Звуковые и десктопные уведомления — Оповещения о завершении или ошибке
- Тёмная тема — Автоматически следует системным настройкам
- i18n — Английский и русский, автоопределение или ручной выбор
- Иконки типа и приоритета в сайдбаре — поля «Тип» и «Приоритет» отображают родные иконки Jira рядом с названием.
- Тип и приоритет задачи в списке MR — опциональная настройка для отображения иконок типа и приоритета рядом со статус-бейджами в списке MR и на странице MR.
- Спринт в сайдбаре — отображает название текущего спринта в боковой панели. Автоматически определяет ID кастомного поля Sprint. 
- Кликабельный Epic Link — ссылка на эпик в сайдбаре открывает его в Jira в новой вкладке. 
- Подтверждение смены статуса — при смене статуса Jira запрашивается подтверждение. Пропускается если включена настройка «Пропускать подтверждения».

- Улучшения страницы списка MR:
    - Приглушение Draft MR — Черновики затемняются, чтобы фокусироваться на активных
    - Подсветка своих MR — Синяя рамка на ваших MR для быстрого поиска                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
    - Кнопка «Только мои» — Фильтр списка по вашим merge requests                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
    - Кнопка «Ждёт моего ревью» — Фильтр MR, где вы назначены ревьюером                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
    - Бейдж «Ваш ревью» — Сканирует комментарии MR на паттерн «Reviewer(s): @вы» и показывает бейдж                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
    - Копирование MR из списка — Кнопка копирования в панели управления каждого MR                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
    - Статусы задач Jira — Показывает статусы Jira-тикетов (Done, In Progress, QA, In Review, To Do) из названий MR. Цветовая кодировка, кеширование, скелетоны загрузки

Преимущества:
- Не требует токенов — использует текущую сессию GitLab
- Работает с любым self-hosted GitLab и gitlab.com
- Заменяет многошаговые ручные действия одним кликом
- Полностью настраивается под каждый проект
- Лёгкое — никаких внешних сервисов, все действия напрямую через GitLab API
- Интеграция с Jira без API-токенов — использует cookies сессии браузера
Prints to the console all cookie setting actions to allow the debugger to check if a certain cookie is being changed/deleted!

Easily track cookie sets or expirations whilst navigating throuhgout a website.
It prints on the console a "green" label when a cookie value is set, and a "red" label when a cookie changes the expiration date.
Add cookie names to the filter list to track and print to the console only the intended cookies.
Celebrate focus daily with 3D fireworks — manage bookmarks & todos, reduce stress, and boost productivity.

🌱🌱🌱Focusportal – Celebrate Every Day, Stay Focused, and Get Things Done
Transform your browser into a daily celebration of focus, productivity, and joy.

🌱🌱🌱Focusportal isn’t just another Chrome extension — it’s your personal productivity hub with a touch of magic. Featuring stunning 3D firework animations that light up your screen like a celebration, Focusportal makes every day feel like a fresh start. Imagine opening your browser and being greeted by a burst of color and energy, instantly lifting your mood, easing stress, and motivating you to tackle your day.

🌱🌱🌱Whether you’re working from home, studying, or managing multiple projects, Focusportal combines powerful organization tools with a delightful, stress-relieving atmosphere — so you can stay productive and inspired.

🌿Why Choose Focusportal?
🎆 Celebrate Every Day
Life can be stressful, and the daily grind can take its toll. Focusportal’s cool 3D animated fireworks aren’t just for show — they’re a visual reminder that every day is worth celebrating. These beautiful animations create a positive start to your day and help you release tension, turning your work environment into something uplifting.

🧘 Relieve Stress & Anxiety
Studies show that taking short moments to relax during work helps you stay focused longer. The gentle fireworks animations are designed to trigger a sense of calm and joy, helping reduce anxiety so you can approach tasks with a clear mind.

✅ Stay Focused on Daily Tasks
Distractions are everywhere online. Focusportal is built to help you keep your mind on what matters most. With integrated to-do lists and bookmark organization, you can have all your essential links, priorities, and reminders in one clean, beautiful space.

📂 Organize Bookmarks Like a Pro
Say goodbye to messy bookmark bars. Focusportal lets you neatly arrange your bookmarks into categories so you can find what you need instantly. Whether it’s work documents, favorite websites, or study resources, your online life is finally organized and accessible.

📝 Manage To-Dos Effortlessly
Keep track of everything you need to do, right in your new tab page. No more switching between apps — your daily tasks are right where you need them, visible every time you open a new tab.

🌱🌱🌱Perfect for…
Students who want to stay on top of assignments without feeling overwhelmed.

Remote workers who need an inspiring workspace to stay productive.

Freelancers managing multiple clients and deadlines.

Anyone looking for a fun, visually pleasing way to stay organized.

🌱🌱🌱Key Features at a Glance:
Beautiful 3D Fireworks Animation – Celebrate every day with vibrant visuals.

Stress Relief – Uplifting animations to brighten your mood.

Task Management – Add, edit, and check off to-dos easily.

Bookmark Organizer – Keep important links categorized and accessible.

Motivational Environment – Start each day feeling inspired, not stressed.

Subscription Access – Unlock the full experience with premium features.

🌱🌱🌱Boost Productivity Without Losing Joy
Most productivity tools focus solely on efficiency. Focusportal is different. It understands that your emotional state matters when you’re trying to get work done. That’s why it merges practical tools with delightful aesthetics — giving you a workspace that’s both functional and enjoyable.

The firework animations aren’t just eye candy; they’re strategically designed to give your brain a small dopamine boost, helping you maintain focus and motivation throughout the day.

🌱🌱🌱How It Works:
Install Focusportal from the Chrome Web Store.

Open a new tab to be greeted by dynamic 3D fireworks.

Add your bookmarks and organize them into easy-to-access categories.

Create your daily to-do list and track your progress.

Enjoy a stress-free, inspiring environment every time you browse.

🌱🌱🌱Subscription Information
Focusportal is a premium productivity experience. To unlock its features, users need to purchase a subscription.

🌱🌱🌱You can view plans and purchase directly at:
🌐 focusportal.top/pricing

The subscription gives you access to:

Full 3D fireworks animation effects.

Unlimited bookmark folders and to-dos.

Regular updates and exclusive new animations.

🌱🌱🌱Why You’ll Love It
We live in a fast-paced world full of notifications, deadlines, and distractions. Sometimes, you need a moment of beauty to remind you that life is more than just ticking boxes. Focusportal offers that moment — every time you open your browser.

It’s the perfect balance between organization and celebration, giving you the motivation to not only get through your day but to truly enjoy it.

Inspect, edit, and clear cookies, localStorage, sessionStorage, IndexedDB, Cache Storage and more — per site.

Strata is a developer's storage inspector for Chrome. It shows you, in one popup, every piece of data a website has stored on your device — cookies, localStorage, sessionStorage, IndexedDB, Cache Storage, Storage Buckets, and more — all scoped to the site you're currently looking at. You can read it, edit it, export it, and wipe it in one click.                                                   
                                                                                                     
  ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━                                                                   
  WHY YOU'D WANT THIS
  ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━                                                                   
                                       
  Modern websites write data to at least five different browser storage APIs. Each one is inspected    
  separately in DevTools, buried inside the Application panel — and half of them don't surface at all
  without drilling through cryptic trees.                                                              
                                       
  Strata flattens that. One popup. Seven tabs. Every byte a site has stored on your device, per-origin,
   with inline editing and bulk delete. When you need to:
                                                                                                       
  • Reproduce a login bug that only happens with a specific cookie set                                 
  • Test what your app does with a malformed JWT in localStorage                                     
  • Wipe a site completely — not the half-wipe Chrome's "Clear browsing data" gives you                
  • Debug an extension you're building (chrome.storage.local/sync/session all visible)                 
  • See what that news site is actually caching in the service worker                                  
  • Edit an IndexedDB record without writing a console script                                          
  • Diff a site's storage before vs. after a bug repro                                                 
                                                                                                       
  …you were probably opening DevTools, hunting the Application panel, clicking through 4 trees, and    
  manually deleting one record at a time. Strata replaces that with a 420-pixel popup that reads       
  everything in parallel, renders it side-by-side, and lets you mutate any of it.                      
                                                                                                     
  ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━                                                                   
  WHAT YOU GET
  ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━                                                                   
                                                                                                       
  ▸ COOKIES — full CRUD with every attribute that matters: domain, path, Secure, HttpOnly, SameSite,   
  expiry. Create new cookies with a proper form (not a flat text field), validate SameSite=None        
  requires Secure, handle subdomain and path-scoped deletion correctly — the built-in "Clear cookies   
  for this site" skips cookies set on parent domains, Strata doesn't.                                
                                                                                                     
  ▸ LOCAL STORAGE & SESSION STORAGE — inspect, edit, delete, create. Edit mode pops a textarea with a  
  "Format JSON" button so when you're staring at a minified JWT or a 3KB base64 blob, one click indents
   it. Save writes back in whichever format you left.                                                  
                                       
  ▸ EXTENSION STORAGE — chrome.storage.local, .sync, and .session. Sub-tabs for each area, live        
  byte-usage counter, auto-refresh on changes via chrome.storage.onChanged. If you're building another
  extension, this is the debug view you wished was built in.                                           
                                       
  ▸ CACHE STORAGE — every named cache the site's service worker has opened, with per-cache entry counts
   and total bytes. Drill into a cache, see every request as a row (URL · method · status · size),
  click any row to open a drawer with the response headers and a pretty-printed body preview. JSON is  
  indented automatically; text is shown as-is; binary payloads are labeled.
                                                                                                     
  ▸ INDEXEDDB — three-level navigation: databases → object stores → records. Shows keyPath,            
  auto-increment flag, and index count for each store. Click into a store and you get a list of
  records. Each record is editable: click edit, get a JSON textarea, Format JSON, Save. Scalar keys and
   object values both supported. Delete a record, a store's entire contents, or the whole database with
   a single confirm.                                                                                 

  ▸ STORAGE BUCKETS — the newer API (Chrome 112+) that lets sites group storage into buckets with      
  per-bucket quotas. Strata feature-detects and hides the tab when unavailable. Per-bucket usage,
  quota, persistence, and durability all visible.                                                      
                                       
  ▸ SHARED STORAGE — when the Privacy Sandbox API is present on the page, Strata shows what it can     
  expose (sharedStorage.length at minimum). When it isn't, you get a clear "unsupported on this page"
  state instead of a mysterious empty list.                                                            
                                       
  ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━                                                                 
  THE FEATURES YOU'LL USE EVERY DAY
  ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━                                                                   
                                                                                                       
  CLEAR SITE DATA — one header icon, one confirm sheet that shows exactly how many items of each type  
  will be deleted, one click. Cookies, localStorage, sessionStorage, Cache Storage, and IndexedDB all  
  wiped at once for the current origin. Because Chrome's built-in "Clear for this site" has surprising 
  gaps, this is the button you reach for when you actually need to start fresh.                      
                                                                                                     
  RIGHT-CLICK ON ANY PAGE — same action, from the context menu. A "Clear all storage for this site"    
  option shows up on any http/https page. A small badge on the toolbar icon confirms success. Use it
  mid-browsing without opening DevTools.                                                               
                                       
  EXPORT AS JSON — copy the current tab's entire contents to your clipboard as pretty-printed JSON,    
  with origin, timestamp, count, and metadata preserved. Paste it into a gist or a file, reproduce a
  bug, run your fix, export again, diff. State-based debugging made trivial.                           
                                       
  LIVE SEARCH — filter by key or value across any tab. 120-ms debounce, instant results. When a site   
  has 200 cookies you need one grep step to find `csrf_token`.
                                                                                                       
  BULK SELECT AND DELETE — checkboxes on every item, a select-all on the toolbar, delete N in parallel.
   Works across every storage surface.                                                               
                                                                                                       
  MEMORY CHART — tap the chart icon in the header. A color-coded stacked bar shows how much each       
  storage type is using on this origin, with a legend of clickable chips that jump you straight to the
  tab you care about. Under the hood it calls navigator.storage.estimate() plus a per-surface          
  breakdown. Use it when a site is mysteriously using 3 GB and you want to know which API is
  responsible.                                                                                       

  QUOTA INDICATOR — header badge shows your storage usage versus the quota for the current origin.     
  Green under 80%, amber 80–95%, red at 95%+. Click it to expand the chart.
                                                                                                       
  ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━   
  DESIGN                                                                                             
  ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━                                                                   
  
  Clean, developer-tool aesthetic — think Raycast or the DevTools Application panel, not a 2010        
  WordPress dashboard. Light and dark themes that follow your system. Per-storage-type accent colors
  at-a-glance scanning works. Monospace for values, proportional for keys. Keyboard-friendly (Escape to
   close sheets, focus trapping).                                                                      
                                                                                                     
  Everything fits in a 420×600 popup without feeling cramped. Tab bar scrolls horizontally with
  fade-edge affordances so you always know there's more. Cards truncate long values with a clean fade  
  and expand on click.                                                                               
                                                                                                       
  ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━   
  PRIVACY — YES, WE MEAN IT                                                                            
  ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
                                                                                                       
  Strata does not talk to the network. Ever. There is no analytics pixel, no telemetry endpoint, no
  remote config. Every byte of JavaScript and CSS is packaged inside the extension. There is not even a
   CDN for a charting library — the memory chart is hand-written on a canvas. Open DevTools → Network  
  on the popup and you'll see zero requests.                                                           
                                            
  What Strata reads:                                                                                 
  - Cookies, localStorage, sessionStorage, IndexedDB, Cache Storage, and Storage Buckets for the page  
  you're currently viewing (and only then).                                                          
  - chrome.storage.* areas you've chosen to inspect (your own extensions' data).                       
  - navigator.storage.estimate() for the active origin.                         
                                                                                                       
  What Strata does not do:             
  - Send any of that to a server.                                                                      
  - Store it beyond the popup's session.
  - Correlate anything across origins.                                                                 
  - Require an account.                                                                                
  - Use your clipboard unless you press Copy or Export.                                              
                                                                                                       
  The only reason the permission requests `<all_urls>` is because browser storage APIs (localStorage,  
  IndexedDB, Cache Storage) live in the page's own context — the extension has to inject a small       
  content script into the active tab to read them. That injection happens only when you open the popup 
  on that tab.                                                                                         
                                                                                                     
  ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━                                                                 
  WHO IT'S FOR                      
  ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
                                    
  • Web developers debugging stateful bugs                                                             
  • QA engineers repro-ing issues that depend on storage                                               
  • Extension developers who want a saner chrome.storage view                                          
  • Performance engineers tracking down "why is this site 2 GB?"                                       
  • Privacy-conscious users who want to actually see (and delete) what sites are storing             
  • Anyone tired of Chrome's "Clear browsing data" being all-or-nothing                                
                                                                                                       
  ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━                                                                   
  TECHNICAL NOTES                                                                                      
  ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━                                                                 
                                                                                                       
  • Chrome Manifest V3                                                                                 
  • Minimum Chrome 102 (Storage Buckets tab hides on older versions)                                 
  • No external dependencies                                                                           
  • Source available at the repository linked in the support URL                                       
  • Licensed MIT                                                                                     
                                                                                                       
  ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━   
                                                                                                       
  If Strata saves you even one debugging session, it's paid for itself. Install it, pin the toolbar
  icon, and the next time you're chasing a state-related bug you'll reach for it before DevTools.
Clean Browse Ledger — Strip tracking from URLs, log cookies and consent, capture privacy policies. All local.

================================================================================
CBL — Clean Browse Ledger
================================================================================

Strips utm_source, fbclid, gclid and more before pages load. Audits cookies, logs consent, and analyzes cookie policies. On-device.


──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
5 KEY FEATURES 
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

• Pre-load URL cleaning — strips utm_source, fbclid, gclid, msclkid, and affiliate parameters before the page loads, with a full before/after record saved to history.

• Cookie inspection — snapshots all cookies for any domain with full detail: name, domain, path, expiration, remaining lifetime, secure, HttpOnly, SameSite, session vs. persistent, and partitioned flag.

• Consent detection — automatically logs when you click cookie banner buttons (Accept All, Reject All, Save Preferences, etc.) with a confidence level and the button text.

• Cookie policy analysis — when consent is detected, fetches the site's privacy policy and runs local keyword analysis to surface advertising cookies, data sharing, third-party vendors, opt-out language, and more.

• 100% on-device — no network requests, no telemetry, no analytics, no cloud processing. All data stays in chrome.storage.local.


──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
DESCRIPTION 
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

CBL — Clean Browse Ledger keeps an honest record of the tracking that follows you as you browse, and quietly cleans URLs before they load. No telemetry, no data sent anywhere. Everything runs locally.


WHAT IT DOES

Pre-load URL Cleaning
Before a page loads, CBL strips tracking parameters and redirects to the clean URL. This covers utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign, fbclid, gclid, msclkid, and affiliate identifiers. Both the original and cleaned URL are saved to history.

Cookie Inspection
For any site you visit, CBL can snapshot all cookies for that domain, including subdomains. Each entry records the name, domain, path, expiration, remaining lifetime, secure, HttpOnly, SameSite policy, session vs. persistent status, and partitioned flag. Cookie values are not stored — only the length.

Consent Detection
When you click a cookie banner button — Accept All, Reject All, Save Preferences, or similar — CBL logs the action with the button text and a confidence level (certain, probable, or unknown).

Cookie Policy Capture and Analysis
When consent is detected, CBL finds the site's privacy policy, fetches the text, and runs a local keyword analysis. The report surfaces advertising cookies, analytics, personalization, data selling, named third-party vendors (40+ recognized), opt-out choices, retention periods, and consent withdrawal options. Results are labeled "what the policy says" — CBL makes no claim about what the site actually does.

Referral Source Attribution
CBL attributes tracking to its source: gclid to Google Ads, fbclid to Meta, msclkid to Microsoft Advertising, and UTM parameters by utm_source value. The HTTP referrer is also recorded.

History and Export
The History page shows a full timeline of events per domain: cleaned URLs, consent actions, cookie snapshots, and policy records. Filter by event type, search by domain, and export as JSON.

Custom Rules
Add your own parameter-stripping rules, enable or disable them individually, preview changes before saving, and import or export your rule set. A denylist exempts specific domains from cleaning.

Badge
A green badge on the extension icon shows how many URLs were cleaned and cookies found for the current tab.


PRIVACY

• All data is stored locally using chrome.storage.local — nothing leaves your device.
• Zero network requests to any third party.
• No analytics, telemetry, or crash reporting of any kind.
• Cookie policy analysis is local keyword matching — no AI, no cloud.
• Uncertain findings are labeled "unknown" rather than guessed at.


TECHNICAL

• Manifest V3
• Plain HTML, CSS, and JavaScript — no third-party frameworks
• URL cleaning via declarativeNetRequest and webNavigation
• Storage via chrome.storage.local only


CBL is not a privacy shield or ad blocker. It does not block trackers or ads. It cleans URLs, records consent actions, and surfaces what cookie policies say — so you know what you agreed to and what followed you.

Inspect colors & images, capture screenshots, forge custom styles, and save presets.

PixelKit — All-in-One Web Design Inspector & Editor

  Extract colors, copy CSS, take screenshots, overlay grids, edit
  styles live, and test APIs — all inside your browser. PixelKit
  brings together the tools designers, developers, and QA teams use
  every day into a single extension.


  Why PixelKit?

  ✔ Work directly on the page you're viewing — no tab switching
  ✔ Replace 10+ separate extensions with one unified toolkit
  ✔ Skip heavy desktop apps like Figma or Postman — your browser is
  enough


  — Free Features —

  ▸ Color Picker
    Click any element to instantly extract its color. Supports HEX,
  RGB, HSL, and OKLCH formats. Every color you pick is saved to your
  history automatically.

  ▸ Hoverify (Element Inspector)
    Hover over any element to see its dimensions, tag, and class names
   at a glance. Click to view detailed CSS properties.

  ▸ Visible Area Screenshot
    Capture what you see in one click.

  ▸ Grid Overlay
    Display Figma-style grids on top of any page. Supports Columns,
  Rows, and Grid (px) types with multiple layers. Includes presets for
   Bootstrap 12-col, 8px Baseline, 960 Grid, and more. Freely adjust
  column count, gutter, margin, max width, color, and opacity.

  ▸ Image Detection
    Hover over images on the page to detect and download them
  instantly.


  — Pro Features —

  ▸ Palette Extractor
    Automatically analyze and categorize the key colors used on any
  page. Perfect for studying design systems or identifying brand
  colors.

  ▸ Font Inspector
    View font family, size, weight, line height, and other typography
  details for any selected element.

  ▸ Spacing Measurement
    Measure the exact pixel distance, padding, and margin between any
  two elements. Instantly verify if implementation matches the design
  spec.

  ▸ Contrast Checker (WCAG)
    Calculate the contrast ratio between background and text colors.
  Shows WCAG AA/AAA pass/fail status — essential for accessibility
  audits.

  ▸ CSS Copy
    Extract CSS from any selected element. Choose from 4 scopes: All,
  Typography, Layout, or Colors — copy only what you need.

  ▸ Area Selection Capture
    Drag to capture a precise region of the page.

  ▸ Full Page Capture
    Capture the entire page including scrollable areas as a single
  image.

  ▸ Annotated Capture
    Draw arrows, boxes, and text before capturing. Ideal for bug
  reports and design feedback.

  ▸ Visual Editor
    Click any element and edit its styles in real time — colors,
  fonts, sizes, and more. Supports Undo/Redo, and all changes can be
  saved as presets for later.

  ▸ Style Strip
    Progressively strip CSS in 4 levels: Grayscale → Remove
  backgrounds → Remove decorations → Naked HTML. Useful for analyzing
  layout structure or testing accessibility.

  ▸ Quick Themes
    Apply built-in themes like Dark Pro, Minimal White, and Terminal
  with one click. Great for dark mode testing or quick visual
  experiments.

  ▸ API Tester
    Send HTTP requests and inspect responses right in your browser —
  no Postman needed.

  ▸ CORS Bypass
    Toggle CORS restrictions on and off during development with a
  single click.

  ▸ Header Modifier
    Add or modify request and response headers freely. Test with
  different auth tokens, User-Agent strings, and more.

  ▸ GraphQL Client
    Execute GraphQL queries and inspect results instantly.

  ▸ JWT Decoder
    Paste any JWT token to automatically decode its header and
  payload.

  ▸ Cookie Manager
    View, edit, and delete cookies for the current domain.

  ▸ Response Viewer & TTFB
    Log API responses in real time and measure Time to First Byte.

  ▸ Dummy Data Generator
    Generate test data (names, emails, addresses, etc.) in JSON or CSV
   format instantly.

  ▸ Preset Manager
    Save your edited styles, hidden elements, and applied themes as
  presets. Reapply them anytime, and export/import as JSON to share
  with your team.


  — Who is PixelKit for? —

  • Designers — Analyze colors, fonts, and spacing from any live site
  in seconds
  • Frontend Developers — Copy CSS, experiment with styles in real
  time, and test APIs without leaving the browser
  • QA & Testers — Create clear bug reports with annotated screenshots
   and accessibility checks
  • PMs & Product Owners — Measure and verify the gap between design
  specs and actual implementation


  — Technical Details —

  • Built on Manifest V3
  • Shadow DOM ensures complete isolation from page styles
  • Zero impact on page performance (pointer-events: none overlay)
  • All data stored locally — nothing is sent to external servers
